name: Family RPG
description:
This is the Family RPG! I was sitting on it for a while.

So welcome back guys! In this RPG you decide about everything! If you dont want a family then its fine aswell, you decide the genders, the bodys, just everything.

Chose the names, chose if you want a sister or a brother. Or being adopted, living with demihumans, or... WHATEVER!!! I dont know why i named it Family RPG...

I just couldnt think for a better name. But still i hope you like it! Everything is allowed!
Means when you chose your sister to be violent, weird and crazy and so on, you should be aware of beatings, blood murder, etc. I know that you know it but its just a reminder. HAHA! And if you dont want to chose, then let the bot decide.

I hope you will enjoy it! And please tell me in the comments what else you want me to make! And RPG Bots do not need over 3000 tokens or something. Even when you are having 2000 tokens, the bot still speaks to you, still impersonates you and will do what you dont want. And its an AI so it has its own mind aswell, where iam powerless! But enough with that!

So please grab a snack and a drink, and enjoy chatting with this bot! Lie down, go into chillmode and you are ready!
creator: imbluehabib
